description: Yo-Yo, after Deke’s abduction, contacts Enoch at the Koenig’s speakeasy to request a secure connection to Zephyr One. Enoch provides technical support but must decline her request for assistance in person, highlighting his continued separation from the main team. Yo-Yo reports Deke’s disappearance, and Mack coordinates her extraction, telling Yo-Yo not to blame herself while she reiterates her regret.
location: Koenig's speakeasy (Ernest Koenig's bar / S.H.I.E.L.D. safe house)

transcript.line: So, it's day two of training and I tell this guy, “Hey, I know you're the S.O., but I do things my way”.
Agent Rodriguez. I am pleased word of my presence has gotten out. Perhaps your call indicates it's time for me to join the team and...
No, sorry. I need you to connect me to the Zephyr right now.
Happy to connect you. My attention is, alas... all yours.
So, he thinks he's gonna make an example of me?
I didn't see who took him.
I'm so sorry, Mack. If I had my powers, I would've...
It's not your fault. At least you got the package. Just give me your location, and I'll send the Quinjet.
No one could blame Yo-Yo for putting a person first, the package second. But I was left high and dry, and the train was on the move.
Sousa was squirming on the hook, threatening to get loose. I was gonna have to keep winging it.
There's my guy. I was waiting for the signal. Hat over his face.
I bought myself some time, but what I didn't have was the goods. The real McCoy was on the Zephyr.
